subject: Youri Tielemans
headline: Manchester United activate release clause for Youri Tielemans
summary: Multiple reports confirm United have triggered Tielemans' reported £35m release clause at Aston Villa and are in advanced talks to complete the signing; the transfer had not been officially completed as of this report.

subject: Manchester United
headline: Manchester United in advanced talks to sign Youri Tielemans
summary: United have activated a release clause for Aston Villa midfielder Youri Tielemans and are in advanced talks to complete a deal reported at £35m.
